response.original_title: LOOKING FOR KARMA KEEP THE PROMISE
response.overview: Cameraman Jak Milroy returns to a Tibetan refugee camp in Nepal to fulfil his promise of helping young refugees to create their dream of forming a Tibetan national football team. He takes with him football equipment and two Scottish football coaches to reenact the 1971 Scottish League Cup Final between Celtic and Partick Thistle.
response.title: LOOKING FOR KARMA KEEP THE PROMISE
